mapper.select: SELECT provider, status, credential_json AS "credentialJson", metadata_json AS "metadataJson", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM auth_state WHERE provider = #{provider}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_state( provider, status, credential_json, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{state.provider}, #{state.status}, #{state.credentialJson}, #{state.metadataJson}, #{state.createdAt}, #{state.updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_state SET status = #{state.status}, credential_json = #{state.credentialJson}, metadata_json = #{state.metadataJson}, updated_at = #{state.updatedAt} WHERE provider = #{state.provider}
